data.narrative:
H2Pro is a Series B-stage climate and energy company that has raised $100M+ to date. The valuation analysis draws on a peer set of six same-stage, same-sector companies, including Commonwealth Fusion Systems ($5.0B), Pano AI ($500M), Sage Geosystems ($400M), Reverion ($310M), and CarbonCapture Inc. ($300M), alongside one public comparable.

Two triangulation methods apply to this analysis. The stage-progression method, anchoring to H2Pro's $100M total raised as a proxy for current valuation and applying a 1.9x step-up multiplier typical of Series B advancement, implies a valuation of $190M. The peer-median approach across the six Climate & Energy Series B comparables yields a median valuation of $355M, with the range spanning $120M to $5.0B. The wide spread reflects heterogeneity in technology maturity and capital intensity within the frontier-energy subsector.

The triangulated analysis across both methods supports a valuation range of $162M (low) to $408M (high), with a median of $272M. This range is anchored at the lower bound by stage-progression mechanics and widens toward peer-median levels. Key uncertainties include H2Pro's position on the maturity curve relative to peers—Commonwealth Fusion Systems' $5.0B valuation reflects its outlier status—and relative progress on commercialization timelines. Additional diligence on unit economics and capital efficiency would refine the range.
